headline: Ana de Armas Pirouettes Into Action With 'Ballerina', Expanding John Wick Universe
lede: The high-octane world of John Wick gets a graceful yet deadly new chapter with 'Ballerina', starring Ana de Armas as a ballet-trained assassin seeking revenge.
body:
Lionsgate's John Wick franchise continues its relentless expansion with 'Ballerina', a pulse-pounding spin-off that transforms dance floor precision into lethal combat choreography. Directed by Len Wiseman, the film leverages Ana de Armas' dual talents for balletic movement and intense dramatic performance.

The narrative follows a young woman trained as both a professional dancer and deadly operative, seeking vengeance within the assassin underworld first established by Keanu Reeves' legendary character. De Armas plays the titular protagonist with a ferocious blend of elegance and raw martial prowess, creating a distinctive entry in the increasingly complex Wick mythology.

Production design emphasizes the stylized violence and aesthetic precision that has become the franchise's hallmark. Cinematographer Mitchell Amundsen captures fight sequences that blur the line between dance and deadly combat, creating visual poetry from brutal confrontations.

While serving as a direct spin-off, 'Ballerina' stands confidently as its own narrative experience, expanding the John Wick universe without feeling derivative. The film signals Lionsgate's continued commitment to building a robust action franchise with compelling, character-driven storytelling.
